title: Eating Right: The Key to a Healthy Life
passage:
The Importance of a Balanced Diet

Maintaining a healthy diet is crucial for overall well-being. A balanced diet provides the body with essential nutrients, including vitamins, minerals, and proteins. These nutrients are vital for various bodily functions, such as immune support, energy production, and tissue repair. However, many people struggle to eat healthily due to busy lifestyles and the temptation of fast food.

To achieve a balanced diet, individuals should aim to include a variety of food groups. This includes fruits, vegetables, whole grains, lean proteins, and healthy fats. For instance, incorporating colorful fruits and vegetables not only adds flavor but also boosts the intake of antioxidants. Furthermore, whole grains such as brown rice and quinoa offer more fiber compared to their refined counterparts.

Portion control is another important aspect of maintaining a healthy diet. Eating in moderation can prevent overeating and help maintain a healthy weight. It is also advisable to limit the intake of added sugars and saturated fats, which can lead to health issues like diabetes and heart disease.

In addition to diet, staying hydrated is essential. Drinking enough water each day can improve digestion, skin health, and even energy levels. Experts recommend consuming at least eight glasses of water daily, but this can vary based on individual activity levels and climate.

In conclusion, adopting a healthy diet is a manageable goal that can lead to substantial health benefits. With proper planning and a mindful approach to food choices, anyone can improve their dietary habits and enhance their quality of life.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What is the main purpose of the passage?

options.A: To explain the benefits of a balanced diet.
options.B: To discuss the dangers of fast food.
options.C: To provide recipes for healthy meals.

questions.explanation: The passage primarily focuses on the importance of maintaining a balanced diet and its benefits for overall health.

questions.text: Eating more whole grains can provide additional fiber.
questions.explanation: The passage states that whole grains offer more fiber compared to refined grains.

questions.text: The author believes that everyone can improve their dietary habits.
questions.explanation: The conclusion suggests that anyone can adopt a healthy diet with planning and mindfulness.

questions.instruction: Match the food group to its benefit.
questions.explanation: Each food group is matched to its specific health benefit as described in the passage.

questions.instruction: Complete the sentence with NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS.
questions.text: Drinking enough water each day can improve __________.
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that adequate hydration improves skin health among other benefits.

vocabulary.meaning: substances that provide nourishment essential for growth and the maintenance of life.
compounds that prevent cell damage by neutralizing free radicals.
the practice of controlling the amount of food consumed.

tactics:
Hướng dẫn

Focus on understanding the main ideas and details presented in each paragraph. Pay attention to keywords in the questions that may relate to information in the text. For multiple-choice questions, eliminate obviously wrong options first. For True/False/Not Given questions, look for specific information that supports the statements made.
